title: craspedia aurantia var. jamesii
intro: Craspedia aurantia var. jamesii, commonly known as yellow buttons, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Craspedia aurantia var. jamesii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
